acceptance_criteria.summary: compact-bead-context.py now emits a JSON bead-context envelope with field-level provenance and untrusted markers for rendered bead fields and dependency titles, including labels as a JSON array value; bin/cdx wraps fetched context in an explicit untrusted-data block before every bead prompt splice.

Malformed payloads, oversized fields/envelopes, missing compact renderer, missing uv, and compact renderer failures fail closed with non-zero exit and clear stderr; cdx no longer falls back to raw bd show text.

Injection fixtures in description, notes, acceptance criteria, and dependency title remain JSON string values under untrusted field metadata, and all cdx bead modes delimit the whole context block as untrusted data.

tests.result: 94 passed after final cold-review advisory test additions

downstream_impacts: bin/cdx -b, -bq, and -br now receive the same untrusted-data wrapper around bead context.
If compact-bead-context.py is missing, uv is unavailable, or the renderer rejects malformed or oversized bd JSON, cdx aborts instead of falling back to raw bd show text.
The plain bd show fallback is disabled, so the untrusted-data boundary is not forgeable by raw bead-controlled physical lines.

evidence_refs.description: tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_emits_untrusted_provenance_envelope validates JSON envelope shape and field-level source/trust/untrusted markers.
tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_emits_untrusted_provenance_envelope asserts labels use content_type application/json with a JSON array value.

tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_rejects_oversized_envelope validates the CDX_BEAD_CONTEXT_ENVELOPE_LIMIT backstop rejects oversized rendered envelopes independently from field limits.

tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_rejects_non_integer_limit_env and ::test_render_context_rejects_non_positive_limit_env validate _read_limit rejects non-integer, zero, and negative environment values with clear errors.
tests/test_cdx_compact_context.py::test_render_context_isolates_injection_fixture_by_field covers description, notes, acceptance_criteria, and dependency title fixtures.

tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py::test_cdx_real_renderer_wraps_injected_end_marker_as_data feeds an injected description through the real compact renderer and bin/cdx wrapper, then asserts the injected END_CDX_BEAD_CONTEXT_UNTRUSTED_DATA line is not present as a standalone line inside the wrapped context body.
tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py::test_cdx_compact_context_failure_aborts_without_raw_fallback validates compact-script failure does not pass raw bd show output.

tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py::test_cdx_missing_compact_context_script_aborts_without_raw_fallback and ::test_cdx_missing_uv_aborts_without_raw_fallback validate missing renderer and missing uv abort before launching Codex.
